-# I can't take it anymore. I'm sick of Thais. I try to play Horla. My Thais does better. I try to play Aigis. My Thais does more vulnerable. I try to play Pickman. My Thais takes less arithmetica. I want to play Ghelot. Her best team has Thais. I want to play Mouchette, Doresain- they both want Thais. She grabs me by the throat. I buy amulets for her. I get pregnant for her. I give her aigis wheel. She isn't satisfied. I pull her wheel. "I don't need this much aliemus regen" She tells me. "Give me more keyflare." She grabs Keeper and forces her to throw herself off enemies. "You just need to funnel me more. I can duplicate more cards." I can't pull for OE, I don't have enough silver. She grabs my credit card. It declines. "Guess this is the end." She grabs her seed. She says "Grow and thrive, my little sapling." There is no hint of sadness in her eyes. Nothing but pure, weakness and vulnerable. What a cruel world.
